title: OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8031092
body: " OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8031092 OFSI General Licence INT/2025/8031092 Publication notice   On 27 November 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/8031092 under regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows for the continuation of business operations with Lukoil International Entities. "
